nasb.text: So the chief cupbearer told his dream to Joseph, and said to him, “In my dream, behold, there was a vine in front of me;

esv.text: So the chief cupbearer told his dream to Joseph and said to him, “In my dream there was a vine before me,

cnv.text: 酒政就把自己的夢告訴約瑟，對他說：“在夢裡我看見我面前有一棵葡萄樹。

ccb.text: 侍酒总管便把自己的梦告诉约瑟，说：“我梦见一棵葡萄树，

csbs.text: 司酒长就向约瑟讲述他的梦，说：“在我的梦中，看哪，有一棵葡萄树在我面前！
